description.value:
Quarantine World

Quarantine worlds are sealed by Imperial writ because whatever lies on their surface is judged too dangerous to risk spreading beyond it. Those who escape such places live on borrowed time, and quickly learn to hide who they are, what they know, and where they came from. That secrecy translates well to an Inquisitorial warband, where keeping truths buried can be as important as uncovering them.

Homeworld Bonus

+Ballistic Skill, +Intelligence, -Strength

Homeworld Aptitude

Fieldcraft

Wounds

8+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 9+)

Homeworld Trait

Secretive by Nature: Whenever the warband's Subtlety would decrease, it decreases by 2 less, to a minimum reduction of 1.

specialAbilities.name: Secretive by Nature
specialAbilities.description: Whenever the warband's Subtlety would decrease, it decreases by 2 less, to a minimum reduction of 1.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 9+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
